title: Housing, method of manufacturing the same, and electronic device including the same
abstract: The present disclosure provides a housing of an electronic device and a method of manufacturing the housing. The method includes forming a basic material of the housing by coupling members of the housing composed of dissimilar materials, planarizing a coupling surface of the basic material of the housing, forming at least one deposition film on the planarized surface, and forming a painting film on the at least one deposition film.
claims: Claims ( 15 ) A method of manufacturing a housing (220) of an electronic device (200) , the method comprising: forming a basic material (410, 420) of the housing (220) by coupling members of the housing composed of dissimilar materials; planarizing a coupling surface of the basic material of the housing (220) ; forming at least one deposition film (520) on the planarized surface; and forming a painting film (530) on the at least one deposition film (520) . The method of claim 1, wherein the basic material of the housing is formed by coupling a metal member and a non-metal member through at least one of dual injection-molding, insert injection-molding, and structural coupling. The method of claim 1, wherein the coupling surface is planarized through buffing. The method of claim 1, further comprising: laminating a primer layer on the planarized surface of the basic material of the housing before forming the at least one deposition film. The method of claim 4, wherein the primer layer is formed of at least one of olefin-based, acryl-based, and urethane-based materials. The method of claim 4, wherein a thickness of the primer layer has a range of 30 ã to 40 ã. The method of claim 1, wherein the at least one deposition film is formed of at least one of Ti-based, Sn-based, and Cr-based materials. The method of claim 1, wherein the at least one deposition film comprises two or more deposition films, and the two or more deposition films are formed of materials having different refractivities. The method of claim 1, wherein a thickness of the at least one deposition film has a range of 100 to 700 . An electronic device (200) comprising: a housing (220) forming at least a portion of an external surface of the electronic device (200) , wherein the housing (220) comprises: a first member (410) ; a second member (420) coupled to the first member (410) to form a basic material of the housing (220) ; a primer layer (510) laminated on the basic material of the housing (220) ; at least one deposition film (520) laminated on the primer layer (510) ; and a painting film (530) laminated on the at least one deposition film (520). The electronic device of claim 10, wherein the first member is a metal member and the second member is a non-metal member. The electronic device of claim 11, wherein the basic material of the housing is formed by coupling the first member and the second member through at least one of dual injection-molding, insert injection-molding, and structural coupling. The electronic device of claim 10, wherein the at least one deposition film is formed of at least one of Ti-based, Sn-based, and Cr-based materials. The electronic device of claim 10, wherein the at least one deposition film comprises two or more deposition films, and the two or more deposition films are formed of materials having different refractivities. The electronic device of claim 10, wherein a thickness of the deposition film has a range of 100 to 700 .
